cloud_type.description: The cloud type. The default and manadatory value is AWS. Supported values are AWS, AZURE, GCP

description.description: Description of the IP group or IP pool

id.description: The ID of the AWS account group.

name.description: The name of the AWS account group. Must be non-null, non-empty, unique, and 128 characters or fewer in length.

secondary_ip.description: IP address of the secondary custom DNS server

description.description: Additional details about the Forwarding Gateway

fail_closed.description:
"A true value indicates that traffic must be dropped when both primary and secondary proxies defined in the gateway are unreachable.
				 A false value indicates that traffic must be allowed."

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to the forwarding gateway

last_modified_time.description: Timestamp when the ZPA gateway was last modified

manual_primary.description:
"Specifies the primary proxy through which traffic must be forwarded
				Depending on the proxy forwarding type specified (AUTODC), this field includes a preconfigured data center, or a specified IP address or domain name."

manual_secondary.description:
"Specifies the secondary proxy through which traffic must be forwarded
				Depending on the proxy forwarding type specified (AUTODC), this field includes a preconfigured data center, or a specified IP address or domain name."

name.description: The name of the Forwarding Gateway

primary_type.description:
"Type of the primary proxy, such as automatic proxy (AUTO), manual proxy (DC) that forwards
				traffic through a selected data center (DC), or override (MANUAL_OVERRIDE) that forwards
				traffic through a specified IP address or domain."

secondary_type.description:
"Type of the secondary proxy, such as automatic proxy (AUTO), manual proxy (DC) that forwards
				traffic through a selected data center (DC), or override (MANUAL_OVERRIDE) that forwards
				traffic through a specified IP address or domain."

addresses.description: IP addresses or domain names included in the group

id.description: ID of the destination IP group

is_non_editable.description: Indicates whether the group is view-only (true) or editable (false)

name.description: Name of the destination IP group

type.description: Type of the destination IP group

creator_context.description: Indicates that the IP group or IP pool is created in Cloud & Branch Connector (EC) (only applicable value)

description.description: Description of the IP group or IP pool

id.description: ID of the IP address group or IP pool

ip_addresses.description: IP addresses included in the IP group or IP pool

is_non_editable.description: Indicates whether the group is view-only (true) or editable (false)

name.description: Name of the IP address group or IP pool

creator_context.description: Indicates that the IP group or IP pool is created in Cloud & Branch Connector (EC) (only applicable value).

description.description: Description of the IP group or IP pool

id.description: ID of the IP address group or IP pool

ip_addresses.description: IP addresses included in the IP group or IP pool

is_non_editable.description: Indicates whether the group is view-only (true) or editable (false)

name.description: Name of the IP address group or IP pool

aup_enabled.description: Indicates whether to enable Acceptable Use Policy (AUP) for this location

auth_required.description:
"Indicates whether to enforce authentication.
				Required when ports are enabled, IP Surrogate is enabled, or Kerberos Authentication is enabled."

caution_enabled.description: Indicates whether to enable Caution for this location

dn_bandwidth.description: Download bandwidth in Kbps. The value 0 implies no Bandwidth Control enforcement.

ec_location.description: Indicates whether this is a Cloud or Branch Connector location (true) or a generic location (false).

enforce_bandwidth_control.description: Enable to specify the maximum bandwidth limits for download (Mbps) and upload (Mbps).

exclude_from_dynamic_groups.description: Indicates whether to exclude this location from dynamic location groups when created

exclude_from_manual_groups.description: Indicates whether to exclude this location from manual location groups when created

ips_control.description: Indicates whether to enable IPS for this location

ofw_enabled.description: Indicates whether to enable firewall for this location

tz.description: Timezone of the location. If not specified, it defaults to GMT

up_bandwidth.description: Upload bandwidth in Kbps. The value 0 implies no Bandwidth Control enforcement.

xff_forward_enabled.description:
"Enable XFF Forwarding for a location.
				When set to true, traffic is passed to Zscaler Cloud via the X-Forwarded-For (XFF) header.
				Note: For sub-locations, this attribute is a read-only field as the value is inherited from the parent location."

name.description: Name of Cloud & Branch Connector location template

cloud_type.description: The cloud type when retrieving a single region. The default value is AWS. Supported values are AWS, AZURE, GCP

id.description: The unique ID of the supported region. When specified, returns a single region.

name.description: The name of the supported region. When specified, returns a single region.

regions.description: List of all supported regions. Populated when neither id nor name is specified.

action.description: Access permission available for the current user to the rule

dest_addresses.description: List of destination IP addresses or FQDNs for which the rule is applicable. CIDR notation can be used for destination IP addresses. If not set, the rule is not restricted to a specific destination addresses unless specified by destCountries, destIpGroups, or destIpCategories.

dest_ip_groups.description: User-defined destination IP address groups to which the rule is applied. If not set, the rule is not restricted to a specific destination IP address group.

dns_gateway.description: The proxy gateway for which the rule is applicable. This field is applicable only for the Proxy Chaining forwarding method.

ec_groups.description: Name-ID pairs of the Zscaler Cloud Connector groups to which the forwarding rule applies

locations.description: Name-ID pairs of the locations to which the forwarding rule applies. If not set, the rule is applied to all locations.

nw_applications.description: User-defined network service applications to which the rule applies. If not set, the rule is not restricted to a specific network service application.

nw_service_groups.description: User-defined network service group to which the rule applies. If not set, the rule is not restricted to a specific network service group.

nw_services.description: User-defined network services to which the rule applies. If not set, the rule is not restricted to a specific network service. Note: When the forwarding method is Proxy Chaining, only TCP-based network services are considered for policy match .

proxy_gateway.description: The proxy gateway for which the rule is applicable. This field is applicable only for the Proxy Chaining forwarding method.

src_workload_groups.description: The list of preconfigured workload groups to which the policy must be applied

state.description: Indicates whether the forwarding rule is enabled or disabled

type.description: The rule type selected from the available options

wan_selection.description:
"WAN selection is only applicable when configuring a hardware device deployed in
				gateway mode. If no value is specified, this field is set to the wide-area network.
				(WAN) configuration selected in the Branch Connector Configuration Template.
				To distribute traffic evenly, specify BALANCED_RULE. To always forward the traffic via the best-performing WAN link, specify BESTLINK_RULE."

zpa_application_segment_groups.description: List of ZPA Application Segment Groups for which this rule is applicable. This field is applicable only for the ECZPA forwarding method (used for Zscaler Cloud Connector).

zpa_application_segments.description: The ZPA application segments to which the rule applies

description.description: The description of the workload group

expression.description: The workload group expression containing tag types, tags, and their relationships.

name.description: The name of the workload group

http_proxy.description: Alternate HTTP proxy of scheme://hostname or scheme://hostname:port format

max_retries.description: maximum number of retries to attempt before erroring out.

parallelism.description: Number of concurrent requests to make within a resource where bulk operations are not possible. Take note of https://help.zscaler.com/oneapi/understanding-rate-limiting.

request_timeout.description: Timeout for single request (in seconds) which is made to Zscaler, the default is `0` (means no limit is set). The maximum value can be `300`.

use_legacy_client.description: Enable ZTW API via Legacy Mode

name.description: Location Name.

aup_enabled.description: Enable AUP. When set to true, AUP is enabled for the location.

aup_timeout_in_days.description: Custom AUP Frequency. Refresh time (in days) to re-validate the AUP.

auth_required.description: Enforce Authentication. Required when ports are enabled, IP Surrogate is enabled, or Kerberos Authentication is enabled.

caution_enabled.description: Enable Caution. When set to true, a caution notifcation is enabled for the location.

dn_bandwidth.description: Upload bandwidth in bytes. The value 0 implies no Bandwidth Control enforcement.

ips_control.description: Enable IPS Control. When set to true, IPS Control is enabled for the location if Firewall is enabled.

ofw_enabled.description: Enable Firewall. When set to true, Firewall is enabled for the location.

up_bandwidth.description: Upload bandwidth in bytes. The value 0 implies no Bandwidth Control enforcement.

xff_forward_enabled.description: Enable XFF Forwarding. When set to true, traffic is passed to Zscaler Cloud via the X-Forwarded-For (XFF) header.
